list.title: Linkifier.class.mjs
list.description: The definition of the main Linkifier class which provides the link rendering functionality with the help of the other classes and modules.

list.title: index.js
list.description: The module's entry point. This file determines what does and does not get exported by the module.

list.title: module:Linkifier
list.description: Linkifier's core link rendering functionality.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#defaultTemplate
list.description: The default link template.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#fetchPageData
list.description: Fetch the page data for a given URL.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#generateLink
list.description: Generate a link given a URL. By default the registered template for the URL's domain will be used, or, if none is registered, the overall default will be used (html).

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#getTemplate
list.description: Get a registered link template by name.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#getTemplateNameForDomain
list.description:
Get the data transformer function for a given domain.

Note that domains are searched from the subdomain up. For example, if passed the domain www.bartificer.net the function will first look for a transformer for the domain www.bartificer.net, if there's no transformer registered for that domain it will look for a transformer for the domain bartificer.net, if there's no transformer for that domain either it will return the default transformer.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#getTransformerForDomain
list.description:
Get the data transformer function for a given domain.

Note that domains are searched from the subdomain up. For example, if passed the domain www.bartificer.net the function will first look for a transformer for the domain www.bartificer.net, if there's no transformer registered for that domain it will look for a transformer for the domain bartificer.net, if there's no transformer for that domain either it will return the default transformer.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#registerDefaultTemplateMapping
list.description: Register a default template for use with a given domain. This template will override the overall default for this domain and all its subdomains.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#registerTemplate
list.description: Register a link template.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#registerTransformer
list.description: Register a data transformer function for a given domain.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#templateNames
list.description: A list of the names of the registered link templates.

list.title: module:cheerio
list.description: The module used to parse HTML documents in a jQuery-like way in the NodeJS.

list.title: module:linkify
list.description: The package entry-point.

list.title: module:linkify.LinkData
list.description: The LinkData class use to store link properties like title and url.

list.title: module:linkify.LinkTemplate
list.description: The LinkTempalte class used for defining the templates for generating links.

list.title: module:linkify.Linkifier
list.description: The Linkifier class that encapsulates the link generations functionality.

list.title: module:linkify.PageData
list.description: The PageData class used to store webpage properties like title and headings.

list.title: module:linkify.VERSION
list.description: The module's current SEMVER version number.

list.title: module:linkify.linkify
list.description: An instantiated Linkifier object ready for use.

list.title: module:mustache
list.description: The templating system used to describe link templates and generaete links.

list.title: module:node-fetch
list.description: The NPM module used to fetch URLs over HTTP(S).
